title: Durinium
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Durinium''' was a metal alloy capable of stopping sensor scans.

It was often valued by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] for its versatility and sensor stopping ability, and was capable of being impregnated into substances ranging from leather to [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]]. As such, it was often used in [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] holsters to conceal illegal weapons, as well as in cargo modules to shield contraband.

==History==
[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] used a case reinforced with durinium, and equipped with microminiature projection devices, to conceal his Mandalorian armor and select weapons when traveling incognito, most notably when he tracked [[Bria Tharen]] on the ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].<ref name="RebelDawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>
